title: Yijing Hexagram 7: Shi (The Army)
description: Hexagram 7 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 7 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Army. The army needs perseverance and a strong man. Good fortune without blame. The earth in the midst of water: the image of the Army.
